title: 151® Hard AS Nails HIGH Power Interior Adhesive Cartridge
features: NO NEED FOR NAILS!: 151 Hard As Nails Adhesive, super strength, ready to use high power adhesive. Bonds surfaces to each other for use on china, wood, metal, card, leather, rubber and glass.

STRONG SOLVENT FREE: 151 Hard As Nails Adhesive, instant grab high strength adhesive is free from solvents. Ready to use, prior to application, surfaces must be dry, clean and free from dust and debris.
REPAIRS & DIY: 151 Hard As Nails Adhesive eliminates the need for screws and nails in many DIY and repair jobs. Suitable for interior bonding on vertical and horizontal surfaces.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, 310ml Cartridge. Store at room temperature
